Container.Name: AxeMobile
Container.Overview: AxeMobile is a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring and managing your Bitaxe and NerdAxe Bitcoin miners. Includes real-time hashrate, temperature and power monitoring, multi-miner support with network scanning, performance presets (Eco, Balanced, Performance, Max OC), firmware update support, Bitcoin network statistics, and a mining calculator.

Config.Name: NODE_ENV
Config.Description: Node environment (runtime is nginx serving static files; this value does not affect behavior)

Config.Name: AXEPOOL_API_URL
Config.Description: URL of the AxePool Stratum stats API. Default assumes the companion container is named "axepool-stratum" on the same Unraid bridge network. Adjust if your AxePoolStratum container has a different name or IP.
